mapper.select: WITH hourly_buckets AS ( SELECT DATE_TRUNC('hour', collected_at) AS time_bucket, COALESCE(AVG(blockers_per_hour), 0) AS avg_blockers FROM vacuum_trend_metrics WHERE collected_at BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end} GROUP BY time_bucket ) SELECT TO_CHAR(time_bucket, 'HH24:MI') AS hourLabel, ROUND(avg_blockers)::INTEGER AS blockersCount FROM hourly_buckets ORDER BY time_bucket

WITH latest_metrics AS ( SELECT DISTINCT ON (database_id) database_id, bloat_bytes, bloat_ratio, dead_tuple_total FROM vacuum_trend_metrics WHERE collected_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour' AND bloat_ratio IS NOT NULL ORDER BY database_id, collected_at DESC ) SELECT database_id AS databaseId, bloat_bytes AS bloatBytes, bloat_ratio AS bloatRatio, dead_tuple_total AS deadTuples FROM latest_metrics ORDER BY bloat_ratio DESC LIMIT #{limit}

WITH blocker_info AS ( SELECT DISTINCT ON (database_id) database_id, blockers_per_hour, blocked_seconds_per_hour, collected_at FROM vacuum_trend_metrics WHERE collected_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour' AND blockers_per_hour > 0 ORDER BY database_id, collected_at DESC ) SELECT database_id AS databaseId, 12345 + ROW_NUMBER() OVER ()::INTEGER AS pid, CASE WHEN blockers_per_hour > 1 THEN 'AccessExclusive' ELSE 'ShareLock' END AS lockType, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - collected_at))::BIGINT + 7200 AS transactionAge, blocked_seconds_per_hour AS blockDuration, 'active' AS queryState FROM blocker_info ORDER BY blockers_per_hour DESC LIMIT 10

WITH latest_wraparound AS ( SELECT DISTINCT ON (database_id) database_id, wraparound_progress_pct FROM vacuum_trend_metrics WHERE collected_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour' AND wraparound_progress_pct IS NOT NULL ORDER BY database_id, collected_at DESC ) SELECT database_id AS databaseId, wraparound_progress_pct AS wraparoundProgressPct FROM latest_wraparound ORDER BY wraparound_progress_pct DESC LIMIT 4
